concepts.body:
# Senior Software Engineer at Acme Corp

## Responsibilities & Impact

- Led a team of 4 engineers to migrate the legacy monolithic API to a modern, event-driven microservices architecture using Node.js and Apache Kafka.
- Improved API response times by 40% (P95 latency dropped from 300ms to 180ms) by introducing Redis caching and optimizing Postgres queries.
- Designed and implemented a robust CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions, reducing deployment time from 45 minutes to under 10 minutes.
- Mentored junior engineers, conducting weekly pair-programming sessions and driving best practices for testing (Jest) and code quality.

## Tech Stack
- Node.js, TypeScript, Express
- PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka
- AWS (ECS, S3, RDS), GitHub Actions

# Career Preferences

I am looking for roles that allow me to focus on building robust backend systems and improving developer experience. 

## Non-Negotiables
- Must be a fully remote or hybrid (max 2 days/week on-site) role.
- Engineering culture must prioritize testing, code review, and healthy work-life balance.

## Nice to Haves
- Opportunities to work on open-source projects.
- Involvement in system architecture and technical design.
- A team that values asynchronous communication.

frontmatter.title: Senior Software Engineer
frontmatter.name: Alex Doe
frontmatter.summary: I am a Senior Software Engineer with 8 years of experience building scalable backend services and data pipelines. I specialize in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP). I am passionate about developer tooling, observability, and open-source software.

concepts.body:
# Professional Summary

I am a Senior Software Engineer with 8 years of experience building scalable backend services and data pipelines. I specialize in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP). I am passionate about developer tooling, observability, and open-source software.

## Core Skills

- **Languages:** TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go
- **Frameworks:** Node.js, Express, React
- **Cloud & DevOps:** AWS, Google Cloud, Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions
- **Databases:** PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB

## Education

- **B.S. in Computer Science** - State University (2014 - 2018)
